segments.text: MR THORNDYKE: Thorndyke's.
segments.translation: 桑代克先生：桑代克公司。

segments.text: EDITH: Good morning. Is that Mr Thorndyke?
segments.translation: 伊迪斯：早上好。是桑代克先生吗？

segments.text: MR THORNDYKE: Speaking. How can I help?
segments.translation: 桑代克先生：请讲。您有什么需要？

segments.text: EDITH: I've got quite a few things which need painting and fixing in the flat and I wonder whether you'd be able to do the work.
segments.translation: 伊迪斯：我公寓里有些东西需要刷漆和修理。我在想你是不是愿意接受这个工作。

segments.text: MR THORNDYKE: I'm sure I'd be able to help but let me take down a few details.
segments.translation: 桑代克先生：我肯定我可以帮上忙，但是请让我记下细节。

segments.text: EDITH: Yes, of course.
segments.translation: 伊迪斯：好的，当然可以。

segments.text: MR THORNDYKE: Well, firstly, how did you hear about us?
segments.translation: 桑代克先生：好的，首先，您是怎样知道我们的？

segments.text: EDITH: It was my friend May Hamoton ... you did some excellent work for her a couple of years ago.
segments.translation: 伊迪斯：是我的朋友梅·汉普顿。几年前你为她做的工作特别好。

segments.text: Do you remember?
segments.translation: 你记得吗？

segments.text: MR THORNDYKE: Oh, yes, that was in West Park Flats, lovely lady.
segments.translation: 桑代克先生：哦是的。那是在西园公寓。很可爱的女士。

segments.text: EDITH: Yes, she is.
segments.translation: 伊迪斯：是的，她是很可爱。

segments.text: MR THORNDYKE: And what's your name, please?
segments.translation: 桑代克先生：请问你叫什么？

segments.text: EDITH: It's Edith Pargetter.
segments.translation: 伊迪斯：是伊迪斯·帕吉特。

segments.text: MR THORNDYKE: Edith ... can you spell your surname, please?
segments.translation: 桑代克先生：伊迪斯…… 请问你可以拼一下你的姓氏吗？

segments.text: EDITH: It's P-A-R-G-E-double T-E-R.
segments.translation: 伊迪斯：是P-A-R-G-E-双写T-E-R。

segments.text: MR THORNDYKE: Double T, right.
segments.translation: 桑代克先生：双写T，好的。

segments.text: And do you live in West Park Flats as well?
segments.translation: 你也住在西园公寓吗？

segments.text: EDITH: NO, actually it's East Park, Flat 4.
segments.translation: 伊迪斯：不，其实是东园，4号公寓。

segments.text: MR THORNDYKE: Oh, right, that's over the road.I seem to remember - quite difficult to get to.
segments.translation: 桑代克先生：哦好的。就是在路的另一侧。我好像记得，不太容易找到。

segments.text: EDITH: Yes, it's at the back of the library.
segments.translation: 伊迪斯：是的，它是在图书馆的后面。

segments.text: MR THORNDYKE: Right, I know. And what's your phone number?
segments.translation: 桑代克先生：好的，我知道了。那你的电话是多少？

segments.text: EDITH: 875934 but I'm out a great deal in the afternoons and evenings.
segments.translation: 伊迪斯：875934，但是我在下午和晚上经常不在。

segments.text: MR THORNDYKE: So would the best time to ring you be in the morning?
segments.translation: 桑代克先生：所以给你打电话最好的时间是上午？

segments.text: EDITH: Yes.
segments.translation: 伊迪斯：是的。

segments.text: MR THORNDYKE: Fine. I've made a note of that.
segments.translation: 桑代克先生：好的。我记下来了。

segments.text: Can I just ask, I'll be in a van and I know parking's rather difficult round your flats.
segments.translation: 我能问一下吗，我会开货车去，而且我知道你公寓附近很难停车。

segments.text: Where would you recommend?
segments.translation: 你建议我停在哪里？

segments.text: EDITH: Well, I always tell people in larger vehicles to park by the postbox on the other side of the road from the entrance.
segments.translation: 伊迪斯：嗯，我通常告诉那些开大车来的人把车停在入口处路对面的邮箱旁。

segments.text: MR THORNDYKE: Good, thanks.
segments.translation: 桑代克先生：好的，谢谢。

segments.text: EDITH: And will you be able to give me a full itemised quote?
segments.translation: 伊迪斯：你能给我一份完整的逐项报价吗？

segments.text: MR THORNDYKE: Oh, yes, I'll list all the jobs separately with individual prices.
segments.translation: 桑代克先生：哦好的。我会把每项工作和价格单独列出来。

segments.text: EDITH: That'd be a great help.
segments.translation: 伊迪斯：那太有帮助了。

segments.text: MR THORNDYKE: No problem.
segments.translation: 桑代克先生：没问题。

segments.text: MR THORNDYKE: Now, what would you like me to do?
segments.translation: 桑代克先生：现在，你想让我做什么呢？

segments.text: EDITH: Firstly and most urgently is in the kitchen.
segments.translation: 伊迪斯：首先最紧要的在厨房。

segments.text: With all the weather damage, the glass in the door has cracked and I'd need that fixing...
segments.translation: 因为糟糕的天气，门上的玻璃裂了需要修理……

segments.text: MR THORNDYKE: I presume you mean replacing?
segments.translation: 桑代克先生：我猜你的意思是换一块？

segments.text: EDITH: Oh, yes. And as soon as possible …
segments.translation: 伊迪斯：哦是的。越快越好……

segments.text: MR THORNDYKE: What I'll do is come round tomorrow morning and do that immediately.
segments.translation: 桑代克先生：那我会这么做，明天一早过来，马上把这个事情处理了。

segments.text: EDITH: Thank you so much.
segments.translation: 伊迪斯：非常感谢。

segments.text: The other things aren't so urgent but ...
segments.translation: 其他的事情没有这么紧急，但是……

segments.text: MR THORNDYKE: Now, I'll make a note of everything you want doing.
segments.translation: 桑代克先生：现在，我来记一下你每件需要做的事。

segments.text: EDITH: Well, in the kitchen I'd like some painting doing.
segments.translation: 伊迪斯：嗯，在厨房里，我想粉刷一下。

segments.text: MR THORNDYKE: All the kitchen walls?
segments.translation: 桑代克先生：厨房所有的墙吗？

segments.text: EDITH: Just the area over the cooker. It's very greasy …
segments.translation: 伊迪斯：只是灶台上方的区域。很油腻……

segments.text: MR THORNDYKE: Right ... it does tend to get that way!
segments.translation: 桑代克先生：好的，灶台上方很容易积存油污了。

segments.text: EDITH: Yes!
segments.translation: 伊迪斯：是的。

segments.text: MR THORNDYKE: Well, if you want a proper job done what I'd need to do is strip the old paint and plaster it about a week before I paint it.
segments.translation: 桑代克先生：那么，如果你想让工程完成的漂亮，我需要把原先的油漆去掉，然后在我刷漆之前大概一周给这片墙刷一遍石膏。

segments.text: EDITH: Of course. Now, May tells me you also do work in the garden.
segments.translation: 伊迪斯：当然。还有，梅告诉我你也做花园里的活。

segments.text: MR THORNDYKE: That's right.
segments.translation: 桑代克先生：是的。

segments.text: EDITH: Well, I'd like you to replace a fence.
segments.translation: 伊迪斯：那么，我想让你换一块篱笆。

segments.text: MR THORNDYKE: Just one?
segments.translation: 桑代克先生：只要一块？

segments.text: EDITH: Yes, at the far end.
segments.translation: 伊迪斯：是的，在最远那头。

segments.text: MR THORNDYKE: Fine. Shouldn't be a problem.
segments.translation: 桑代克先生：好的。应该没有问题。

segments.text: EDITH: And that's the lot.
segments.translation: 伊迪斯：就是这些。

segments.text: MR THORNDYKE: Fine. Yeah, as I say I can come round tomorrow morning to look over things with you.
segments.translation: 桑代克先生：好的。就像我说的，我明天上午会过来来和你查看一遍这些东西。

segments.text: EDITH: That's great, thank you.
segments.translation: 伊迪斯：太好了。谢谢你。

segments.text: MR THORNDYKE: So, I'll look forward to seeing you tomorrow at ...
segments.translation: 桑代克先生：期待明天和你见面……
